title: Mounted Local Bulk Add Work Route
summary: Mounted the Bulk Add Work route shell in the local Studio app server and retired the old Jekyll route shell.
effect: The local Studio app now serves /studio/bulk-add-work/?mode=manage with the existing vanilla Bulk Add Work browser module, workflow helper, configured workbook path, and route-ready contract. The route keeps the existing unavailable-service behavior when the catalogue sibling service is not running, and the old Jekyll /studio/bulk-add-work/ shell has been removed. The catalogue import preview/apply APIs remain sibling calls for a later route-family API consolidation slice.
verification: Python compile checks passed for the touched Studio app server, view, config, and smoke files
